title.phon: om bar do druk gi tsa tsik shuk so
title.en: The Root Verses of the Six Bardos

source.attribution: Taught by Padmasambhava and revealed by Tertön Karma Lingpa at Daglha Gonpo Palri, per the colophon. English translation from The Stairway to the Pure Lands by Lopen Phuntsho Gyaltshen (2009).

heading.en: Root Verses of the Six Bardos

blocks.phon:
om kyé ma dak la kyé né bar do char dü dir
tsé la long mé lé lo pang jé né
blocks.en:
O alas! At the time when the Bardo of Birth and Living, arises in me,
Since there is no certainty in life, may we, having shunned laziness,

blocks.phon:
tö sam gom sum ma yeng lam la juk
nang sem lam long ku sum ngön gyur ja
blocks.en:
Without distraction, engage into the path of listening, reflecting and meditation!
Having accepted appearances and mind as the path, may we manifestly actualize the three Kayas!

blocks.phon:
mi lü len chik tob pé dü tsö dir
yeng ma lam la dö pé dü tsö min
blocks.en:
At the time when we have achieved this single-time human rebirth,
It is not right for us to stroll on the path to distractions!

blocks.phon:
kyé ma dak la mi lam bar do char dü dir
ti muk ro nyal bak mé pang jé né
blocks.en:
O alas! At the time when the Bardo of Dream arises in me,
Having shunned the dead-body like ignorant sleep and carelessness,

blocks.phon:
dren pa yeng mé né luk ngang la juk
mi lam zung né trul gyur ö sal jang
blocks.en:
And with undistracted mindfulness, may we engage into the innate state!
Having mastery over dreams, may we practice manifest-transform exercises and the luminosity!

blocks.phon:
dü dro shyin du nyal war ma jé chik
nyi dang ngön sum dré pé nyam len ché
blocks.en:
Let us sleep not like an animal!
It is dearly crucial to practice the merging of sleep and awake-state as one!

blocks.phon:
kyé ma dak la sam ten bar do char dü dir
nam yeng trul pé tsok nam pang jé né
blocks.en:
O alas! At the time when the Bardo of Samadhi arises in me,
Having shunned the host of confusing distractions,

blocks.phon:
yeng mé dzin mé ta dral ngang la juk
kyé dzok nyi la ten pa tob par ja
blocks.en:
May we enter into the undistracted, limitless state without grasping,
And achieve the stability of the two stages (generation and completion)!

blocks.phon:
ja wa pang né tsé chik gom dü dir
nyön mong trul pé wang du ma tang shyik
blocks.en:
In this time, having shunned business while practicing one-pointedly,
May we let not ourselves be swayed away by the delusion of kleshas!

blocks.phon:
kyé ma dak la chi kha bar do char dü dir
kün la chak sem shyen dzin pang jé né
blocks.en:
O alas! At the time when the Bardo of Death arises before me,
Having shunned attachment and clinging to anything,

blocks.phon:
dam ngak sal wé ngang la ma yeng juk
rang rik kyé mé nam khé ying su po
blocks.en:
May we enter the state where key instructions are clear without distraction,
And transfer our own Rigpa into the sphere of unborn space!

blocks.phon:
dü jé sha trak lü dang dral la khé
mi tak gyu ma yin par shé par ja
blocks.en:
When it is time to separate from the compounded, body of flesh and blood,
May we know the process as impermanence and illusion!

blocks.phon:
kyé ma dak la chö nyi bar do char dü dir
kün la ngang trak jik nang pang jé né
blocks.en:
O alas! At the time when the Bardo of Dharmata arises for me,
Having overcome fear and panic regarding anything,

blocks.phon:
gang shar rang nang rik pa ngo shé juk
bar dö nang tsul yin par shé par ja
blocks.en:
May we enter the recognition of ones own Rigpa, knowing appearances to be one's own reflections,
And know that those are the way of appearances in the state of Bardo!

blocks.phon:
dön chen gak la tuk pé dü shik yin
rang nang shi trö tsok la ma jik shik
blocks.en:
This is the momentous time, great turning point, the crucial hour,
And may we never be afraid of the hosts of one's self-appearances - the peaceful and wrathful deities!

blocks.phon:
kyé ma dak la si pa bar do char dü dir
dün pa tsé chik sem la zung jé né
blocks.en:
O alas! At the time when the Bardo of Existence arises before me,
With one-pointed intention maintained in my mind,

blocks.phon:
zang po lé kyi tro la nen gyi tü
ngal go kak né ru lok dren par ja
blocks.en:
May we put effort to connect to the continuity of wholesome karma,
And having blocked the door of the womb, may we be mindful of the reversal of Samsara!

blocks.phon:
nying rü dak nang gö pé dü shik yin
mik ser pang la la ma yab yum gom
blocks.en:
This is the time when we require perseverance and pure perception!
May we shun jealousy and visualize one's Guru and his consort!

blocks.phon:
chi wa ong nyam mé pé lo ring po
dön mé tsé di ja wa drub drub né
blocks.en:
The procrastinating mind that does not think death may come,
Keeps on engaging in meaningless activities of this life,

blocks.phon:
da ré tong lok jé na shin tu trul
gö ngo shé pa dam pé lha chö yin
blocks.en:
And wastes this opportunity today, it should be a grave error!
Hence, knowing the purpose of this life is the sublime Dharma!

blocks.phon:
da ta nyi du lha chö mi jé dam
drub chen nam kyi shyal né di ké sung
blocks.en:
Will you really not practice the Dharma, right now?
That is how the great-accomplished adepts taught us!

blocks.phon:
la mé dam ngak sem la ma shyak na
rang gi rang nyi lu war mi gyur ram
blocks.en:
And if these Gurus key instructions are not kept in the mind,
Are we not decieving ourselves?
